is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study is entirely on Plasmodium falciparum QTL mapping and PfNHE-1 polymorphism surveys.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Paper focuses on QTL mapping (pfcrt, pfmdr1 loci) and PfNHE-1 microsatellite/point polymorphisms (codons 790, 894, 950). No curated target codon frequencies (e.g. pfcrt 76, pfmdr1 86 genotype frequencies) are reported; pfcrt/pfmdr1 are discussed only as QTL peaks, not as codon-level frequency data.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 2 lists individual isolate polymorphisms (PfNHE-1 codons and microsatellite types), not population frequencies at curated drug-resistance codons. No numerator/denominator counts per locus for target markers.

sub_country_location.evidence: Table 2 origins are given at country level or broad region only (e.g. 'Kenya', 'Sudan', 'The Gambia', 'Ghana', 'Africa'); many entries are lab/culture-adapted clones with no sub-national site.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: No collection dates are provided for the surveyed isolates; these are archived culture-adapted lines with no usable collection time window.

african_field_samples.evidence: Isolates in Table 2 are culture-adapted reference clones/lines (e.g. 3D7, HB3, Dd2, 7G8, Sudanese lines 106/1, 123/5) mixed with global origins; the core study is a genetic cross of lab clones HB3xDd2 (Honduras and Indochina), not African field surveillance.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical QTL-mapping and polymorphism-survey study.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Isolate panel overlaps with previously published collections (e.g. Mu et al. 2003 outbred isolates, Wootton et al. 2002); PfNHE-1 survey of 71 lines drawn from established reference/lab strains reused across NIH studies.

supplement.evidence: Supplementary Tables S1 (progeny phenotypes/markers) and S2 (chr13 genes) do not contain target drug-resistance codon frequencies with sub-national/temporal metadata.

assessment.summary: This is a QTL-mapping study of quinine response in the P. falciparum HB3xDd2 genetic cross, plus a survey of PfNHE-1 microsatellite/point polymorphisms (codons 790, 894, 950 — not curated targets) in 71 worldwide culture-adapted lines. It does not report curated drug-resistance codon frequencies (pfcrt/pfmdr1 codons) with extractable numerator/denominator counts, provides only country-level or lab-strain origins, and gives no collection dates. Samples are largely reference/lab clones rather than African field isolates.
exclusion_reasons: No curated target drug-resistance codon frequencies reported (only PfNHE-1 non-target codons and QTL peaks)
No extractable per-locus population frequencies for target markers
Locations only at country level or lab strains, no sub-national resolution
Isolates are culture-adapted reference/lab clones, not African field surveillance samples
